sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67763" key="mikro/sarkos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μικρό-σαρκος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n67763.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with little flesh</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Xenocr.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:2:58:81" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.58.81</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
